---
title: "Sarthak Arora"
subtitle: "Notes on ML, GPU programming, and systems."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
